entries.source: "Check my essay thesis"
entries.value: "Suriin ang thesis ng aking sanaysay"

entries.source: "Give me a hint for this physics problem"
entries.value: "Bigyan mo ako ng hint para sa ito physics problema"

entries.source: "Help me start this word problem"
entries.value: "Tulungan mo akong simulan ito salita problema"

entries.source: A practical guide to using Homework Coach on inspir for practice learning, with prompts, study loops, and safer AI habits.
entries.value: Isang praktikal gabay sa gamit ang Homework Coach sa inspir para sa Magsanay ng pag-aaral, kasama ang mga prompt, mga loop sa pag-aaral, at mas ligtas AI mga gawi.

entries.source: A stronger study loop
entries.value: Isang mas malakas loop sa pag-aaral

entries.source: AI Homework Coach With Hints, Not Answer Dumping is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Get unstuck on homework with hints, examples, and checks that help you do the thinking yourself.
entries.value: AI Homework Coach Kasama ang Mga hint, Hindi Pagbibigay lang sagot ay isang nakapokus way gamitin AI para sa pag-aaral instead ng pasibo sagot koleksyon. Ang mode ay ginawa sa paligid ng isang tiyak gawain: Get unstuck sa homework kasama ang mga hint, mga halimbawa, at sinusuri na tulong ikaw gawin ang thinking yourself.

entries.source: AI Homework Coach With Hints, Not Answer Dumping: practical guide
entries.value: AI Homework Coach Kasama ang Mga hint, Hindi Pagbibigay lang sagot: praktikal gabay

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: AI na tutor

entries.source: Ask for a small first step rather than a final answer.
entries.value: Humingi ng isang small una hakbang rather kaysa isang huling sagot.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Magtanong ang AI suriin iyong pangangatwiran, hindi lang resulta.

entries.source: Find the next step.
entries.value: Hanapin ang susunod hakbang.

entries.source: Finish by writing the idea back from memory.
entries.value: Finish ng pagsusulat ang ideya likod mula sa memory.

entries.source: Homework Coach
entries.value: Gabay sa Takdang-Aralin

entries.source: Practice
entries.value: Pagsasanay

entries.source: Practice a similar problem.
entries.value: Magsanay ng isang similar problema.

entries.source: Prompts to try
entries.value: Mga prompt sa subukan

entries.source: Start the live mode at Homework Coach. If you want a neighboring learning format, try Math Step Coach. For a broader view of the platform, read what an AI learning companion should do for everyone.
entries.value: Magsimula ang live mode at Homework Coach. Kung ikaw gusto isang neighboring pag-aaral format, subukan Math Hakbang Coach. Para sa isang mas malawak view ng ang platform, Basahin ano isang AI katuwang sa pag-aaral dapat gawin para sa lahat.

entries.source: Students who need help starting a problem, checking work, or understanding a mistake.
entries.value: Mga mag-aaral na nangangailangan ng tulong sa pagsisimula ng problema, pag-check ng gawa, o pag-unawa sa isang pagkakamali.

entries.source: Tell the mode what you are trying to learn or produce.
entries.value: Sabihin sa mode kung ano ang sinusubukan mong matutunan o mabuo.

entries.source: That difference shows up in the flow. Instead of one giant response, the best sessions move through a loop: set a goal, try something, get feedback, repair the weak spot, and choose the next action.
entries.value: Na difference shows up sa ang flow. Instead ng isa giant response, ang pinakamahusay mga session lumipat sa pamamagitan ng isang loop: set isang layunin, subukan something, get feedback, repair ang mahina spot, at pumili ang susunod action.

entries.source: That focus matters. A general chatbot can answer almost anything, but a learning mode gives the conversation a shape. It nudges you toward the kind of thinking, practice, feedback, or exploration that helps the idea stick.
entries.value: Na pokus matters. Isang general chatbot Maaari bang sagot almost anything, pero isang pag-aaral mode gives ang conversation isang shape. Ito nudges ikaw toward ang kind ng thinking, pagsasanay, feedback, o exploration na tumutulong ang ideya stick.

entries.source: The coach supports your thinking without taking over the assignment, so the final work stays yours.
entries.value: Sinusuportahan ng coach ang iyong pag-iisip nang hindi inaako ang iyong takdang-aralin, kaya ang huling gawa ay mananatiling sa iyo.

entries.source: This is the same habit behind studying with AI without cheating yourself: keep the learner active. AI is most useful when it gives you feedback on your thinking.
entries.value: Ito ay ang same gawi behind studying kasama ang AI nang walang cheating yourself: keep ang mag-aaral aktibo. AI ay pinaka kapaki-pakinabang kapag ito gives ikaw feedback sa iyong thinking.

entries.source: This mode is especially useful for learners who want to:
entries.value: Ito mode ay especially kapaki-pakinabang para sa mga mag-aaral sino gusto sa:

entries.source: Try the step in your own words.
entries.value: Subukan ang hakbang sa iyong own mga salita.

entries.source: Understand the mistake.
entries.value: Understand ang pagkakamali.

entries.source: Use Homework Coach when you want a session that starts quickly but still adapts to you. The first goal is not to sound impressive. The first goal is to make the next step feel possible.
entries.value: Gamitin Homework Coach Kapag ikaw gusto isang session na nagsisimula quickly pero pa rin umaangkop sa ikaw. Ang una layunin ay hindi sa tunog impressive. Ang una layunin ay gumawa ang susunod hakbang feel posible.

entries.source: What this mode helps with
entries.value: Saan nakatutulong ang mode na ito

entries.source: Where to go next
entries.value: Saan susunod

entries.source: You can also start with a rough version of your real problem. A messy first prompt is fine. The session can clarify the level, audience, deadline, and style once you begin.
entries.value: Ikaw Maaari bang also magsimula kasama ang isang magaspang version ng iyong totoo problema. Isang magulo una prompt ay fine. Ang session Maaari bang clarify ang antas, madla, deadline, at estilo once ikaw magsimula.
